title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Panchshil Realty - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Panchshil Realty - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Panchshil Realty has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Allahabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Panchshil Realty:
Panchshil Realty is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Panchshil Realty!
